name: o11yparty-concurrency-tests
description: Concurrency / load tests that drive real Blazor Server circuits against the deployed O11yParty buzzer + game on AWS App Runner, to reproduce and later verify the /_blazor affinity 404 failure.

scripts.baseline: cross-env PASS_THRESHOLD=0 tsx src/buzzer-load.ts && cross-env PASS_THRESHOLD=0 tsx src/game-e2e.ts
